description: a4/ workspace lifecycle hooks for Codex. This manifest is referenced by `.codex-plugin/plugin.json` and intentionally contains only Codex-supported hook events. Commands set A4_HOOK_RUNTIME=codex and dispatch to `scripts/a4_hook.py` via PLUGIN_ROOT. The Python runtime layer resolves the plugin root from PLUGIN_ROOT and derives the project root from the official Codex hook stdin cwd field, using the git root when available and cwd otherwise. Session-scoped state is kept under `.claude/tmp/a4-edited/` in the active project. Codex apply_patch payloads are parsed from `tool_input.command`; PreToolUse stores pre-edit status state, PostToolUse records edits, runs status-change cascades, and reports status consistency, Stop validates edited a4 files, UserPromptSubmit resolves #id references, and SessionStart sweeps stale a4 hook state and injects the a4 workspace map.

hooks.description: Snapshot on-disk a4/*.md `status:` for Codex apply_patch edits
Record edited a4/*.md files, run status-change cascade, and report status-consistency
Validate a4/*.md files edited this session; emit JSON `{decision: block, reason}` on violations to force a continuation
Sweep stale a4 hook state and inject type-to-file-location map as additionalContext
Resolve #<id> references in the prompt to a4/<type>/<id>-<slug>.md paths (per-session dedupe)
